title: Minimum Number of Increments on Subarrays to Form a Target Array
hints: Consider how the required number of operations changes as you move from one element to the next in the target array.
Focus on the difference between adjacent elements. When does target[i] require new operations compared to target[i-1]?
The answer is the first element plus the sum of all positive differences between adjacent elements target[i] - target[i-1].
